description: Display gridpoint information in the console. The following keywords are available to choose which information to list.

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Display gridpoint information in the console. The following keywords are available to choose which information to list.

keywords.name: acceleration
keywords.description: Gridpoint acceleration. The optional local keyword specifies that acceleration should be reported in local gridpoint coordinates; the default is in model/global coordinates.

keywords.name: apply
keywords.description: Gridpoint applied forces. The optional local keyword specifies that acceleration should be reported in local gridpoint coordinates; the default is in model/global coordinates.

keywords.name: damping
keywords.description: Gridpoint damping parameters

keywords.name: displacement
keywords.description: Gridpoint displacements. The optional local keyword specifies that acceleration should be reported in local gridpoint coordinates; the default is in model/global coordinates.

keywords.name: dynamic
keywords.description: Gridpoint dynamic damping parameters

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Extra gridpoint variable for extra array index i

keywords.name: force
keywords.description: Gridpoint unbalanced forces. The optional local keyword specifies that acceleration should be reported in local gridpoint coordinates; the default is in model/global coordinates.

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Gridpoint group assignments. When the optional slot is supplied, only groups in that slot are listed; otherwise all groups are listed.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: General gridpoint information: position, mass, fixity, and applied-velocity for each gridpoint. This is the default option if no keyword is given when zone.gridpoint.list is used.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: Position coordinates of gridpoint.

keywords.name: system
keywords.description: Gridpoint local coordinate system, if the local coordinate system is specified.

keywords.name: velocity
keywords.description: Gridpoint velocities. The optional local keyword specifies that acceleration should be reported in local gridpoint coordinates; the default is in model/global coordinates.

keywords.name: zone
keywords.description: List of zones connected to gridpoint.

keywords.name: acceleration
keywords.description: Gridpoint acceleration. The optional local keyword specifies that acceleration should be reported in local gridpoint coordinates; the default is in model/global coordinates.

keywords.name: apply
keywords.description: Gridpoint applied forces. The optional local keyword specifies that acceleration should be reported in local gridpoint coordinates; the default is in model/global coordinates.

keywords.name: damping
keywords.description: Gridpoint damping parameters

keywords.name: displacement
keywords.description: Gridpoint displacements. The optional local keyword specifies that acceleration should be reported in local gridpoint coordinates; the default is in model/global coordinates.

keywords.name: dynamic
keywords.description: Gridpoint dynamic damping parameters

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Extra gridpoint variable for extra array index i

keywords.name: fluid
keywords.description: Gridpoint information on fluid, including pore-pressure and fluid fixity, as well as saturation, Biot modulus, fluid modulus and fluid tension if model configure fluid has been specified.

keywords.name: force
keywords.description: Gridpoint unbalanced forces. The optional local keyword specifies that acceleration should be reported in local gridpoint coordinates; the default is in model/global coordinates.

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Gridpoint group assignments. When the optional slot is supplied, only groups in that slot are listed; otherwise all groups are listed.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: General gridpoint information: position, mass, fixity, and applied-velocity for each gridpoint. This is the default option if no keyword is given when zone.gridpoint.list is used.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: Position coordinates of gridpoint.

keywords.name: system
keywords.description: Gridpoint local coordinate system, if the local coordinate system is specified.

keywords.name: temperature
keywords.description: Gridpoint temperature; only available if model configure thermal has been specified.

keywords.name: velocity
keywords.description: Gridpoint velocities. The optional local keyword specifies that acceleration should be reported in local gridpoint coordinates; the default is in model/global coordinates.

keywords.name: zone
keywords.description: List of zones connected to gridpoint.
